_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting institutional signals (ETF flows at 100, VIX at 65, MVRV z-score at 24) likely resolve as continued chop within Anxiety rather than a clean trend leg, and the bottom analog tells us what may come next but does not move the current phase up the ladder.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction while narrative writer implies accumulation prelude; consensus sides with analyst per Jordan's trust weights.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 with btc_momentum_30d falling under 40 and funding compressing to 35
next_move.invalidated_if: btc_momentum_30d sustains above 60 with fear_greed climbing above 40 and mvrv_zscore recovering above 35
